sourceMovie.title: Dominique
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Dominique (2024) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: First Blood
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Dominique clicked for you, First Blood (1982) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Dominique?
faq.answer: Try First Blood, Die Hard: With a Vengeance, The Island—each shares DNA with Dominique while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Dominique?
faq.answer: Dominique (2024) is best described as Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Dominique worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
